name: Math is easy!
description: Math is Easy! is an exciting and challenging game for anyone who wants to practice math! Test your skills by combining examples with correct answers, and calculate a wide variety of expressions. - Many mathematical operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, fractions, roots, degrees, etc. - Difficulty levels: Start with simple examples and gradually move on to complex calculations. - Compete: Compare your scores with other players in the global high score table. - Develop your skills: Hone your mathematical intuition and expand your knowledge.
instructions: Connect examples red text left column and answers green text right column by pressing the cursor or finger When all the blocks on the screen are paired you can test yourself Explanations 1 log X Y is the logarithm of Y based on X 2 sqrt is th
tags: free html5 games for your website
